wizard.ingestionTodo: Upload documents to build the knowledge base
wizard.datasetTodo: Generate Q/A pairs from your documents
wizard.trainingTodo: Fine-tune a model on your dataset

health.apiDesc: The backend is not responding — no feature will work until it is up.
health.chatDesc: Answers, dataset generation and evaluation need it. Download a model, then restart the stack.
health.chatModelTitle: LLM server is up but no model is loaded
health.chatModelDesc: Place a .gguf file in data/models/ or download the default model.
health.embedDesc: Document ingestion and semantic search need it.
health.chromaDesc: Vector storage is unavailable — ingestion and retrieval will fail.

dashboard.title: DASHBOARD
dashboard.chatModelHint: Run ./setup.sh --download-chat (Windows: setup.bat) or place your .gguf in data/models/
dashboard.embeddingModelHint: Run ./setup.sh --download-embed (Windows: setup.bat) or place embed.gguf in data/models/
dashboard.step1Desc: PDF, DOCX, TXT or URLs — drop your files into the Ingestion page or run adddoc.bat examples to test.
dashboard.step2Desc: Spectra automatically generates Q/A pairs from your documents. Expect 30–120 s/chunk on CPU.
dashboard.step3Desc: Pick a recipe (e.g. "Fast CPU") and fine-tune the model on your domain.
dashboard.tipPrefix: New here? Drop the files from the
dashboard.tipSuffix: to validate the pipeline in 5 minutes.
dashboard.pipelineReady: Pipeline ready — {{chunks}} chunks · {{pairs}} pairs · model ready to fine-tune
dashboard.pipelineEmpty: Empty knowledge base — ingest documents to get started (step 1)

playground.expertModeHint: Show technical details: RAG strategy badges, vector distances and latency metrics.
